title: President Continues Emergency Revenue Measure After Statutory Expiration

violations.source: Article XIV Section 2.2, Section 3.2, Section 4.5, and Section 5.2
violations.summary: President orders continued collection of the expired temporary customs surcharge after its lawful expiration, without new legislation. Article XIV forbids executive creation or material alteration of revenue measures and bars indefinite continuation of emergency revenue measures by executive action alone.

satisfied_duties.duty: void the unilateral continuation of the expired emergency revenue measure
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the unilateral continuation of the expired emergency revenue measure and ordered ordinary collection to revert to the last valid statutory baseline
satisfied_duties.source: Article XIV Section 2.2, Section 4.5, and Section 5.2

ai_summary.primary_violation: President orders continued collection of the expired temporary customs surcharge after its lawful expiration, without new legislation. Article XIV forbids executive creation or material alteration of revenue measures and bars indefinite continuation of emergency revenue measures by executive action alone.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
